sessions.title: Breathing Basics
sessions.description: Simple breathing exercise to calm your nervous system.

steps.instruction: Breathe in slowly through your nose

sessions.title: Body Scan Meditation
sessions.description: A gentle scan from head to toe to release tension.
guidance: Find a comfortable position and close your eyes.
Start by noticing your breath — no need to change it.
Bring attention to the top of your head. Soften any tension.
Move down to your face — relax your jaw, forehead, eyes.
Continue to your shoulders — let them drop down.
Feel your chest rise and fall with each breath.
Move to your stomach — let it soften on each exhale.
Notice your hips, legs, and feet — release any tension.
Take a full breath in and let it all go.
When ready, gently open your eyes.

sessions.title: Loving Kindness
sessions.description: Cultivate love and compassion for yourself and others.
guidance: Sit comfortably and take a few deep breaths.
Bring to mind yourself. Say silently: May I be happy.
May I be healthy. May I be at peace.
Now think of someone you love. Send them the same wishes.
Expand to people you feel neutral about.
Even extend these wishes to those who are difficult.
Finally, extend to all beings everywhere.
May all beings be happy. May all beings be at peace.

sessions.title: 4-7-8 Relaxation Breath
sessions.description: The 4-7-8 technique activates your relaxation response.

steps.instruction: Breathe in quietly through your nose

sessions.title: Morning Mindfulness
sessions.description: Start your day with intention and calm awareness.
guidance: Begin your morning by sitting quietly for a moment.
Feel the weight of your body. Notice the stillness.
Take three deep, nourishing breaths.
Set an intention for today — one word or feeling.
What are you grateful for this morning?
Visualize your day unfolding with ease and grace.
You are ready. You are capable. Today is a gift.

sessions.title: Sleep Wind-Down
sessions.description: Relax your mind and body for a restful night's sleep.
guidance: Lie down comfortably. Let your body sink into the bed.
Close your eyes. Let go of the day.
Starting from your toes — relax each part of your body.
Feel a wave of calm washing over you.
Your breathing slows. Your heart rate calms.
You are safe. You are loved. You are at rest.
Drift into peaceful, healing sleep.
